description: Create a 3-page C4 Model architecture diagram for the Mastodon social network based on the specification provided in '~/Desktop/mastodon_architecture_spec.txt'. The diagram must include a System Context page (featuring Mastodon, End User, Mobile App Client, Remote Fediverse Instance, Email Provider, and Object Storage), a Container page (featuring Web Application, Streaming API, Sidekiq Workers, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, and Nginx), and a Component page for the Web Application (featuring Authentication, REST API Controller, ActivityPub Controller, Media Handler, Timeline Aggregator, Notification Service, Account Manager, and Status Manager). Save the draw.io file to ~/Desktop/mastodon_c4.drawio and export the diagram to ~/Desktop/mastodon_c4.png.
